name: Atmata v1
description: Atmata is a bold AI/automation company operating in the MENA region, and their existing deck uses a deep black canvas with electric cyan as the hero accent — communicating precision, speed, and technological authority. The logo mark (three hexagons arranged in a honeycomb cluster) is rendered here in solid black, which we reinterpret as a white logo on dark surfaces, keeping the geometric modular feel. The palette preserves their signature electric cyan primary but shifts it slightly cooler/brighter (#18C4F5) against an ultra-deep near-black (#09090F), with a dark surface one step lighter for layering — matching the deck's cinematic dark-wall aesthetic. Typography upgrades the heading to Space Grotesk (geometric, slightly quirky, technical-forward) paired with Inter for body — a tighter, more premium pairing than the plain bold sans currently in use, while preserving the all-caps declarative tone. The single-bar cyan accent stripe and solid-dark cover style faithfully mirror the right-edge cyan bar and black full-bleed cover seen across all deck slides.
